expectations.text: The presentation contains exactly 3 slides
expectations.evidence: Found 3 <hd-slide> tags in the HTML file.

expectations.text: No custom CSS styles, style attributes, or css files are included
expectations.evidence: No <style> tags or inline style attributes found.

expectations.text: Slides use correct Cover, Standard, and Split layouts respectively
expectations.evidence: Slide 1 uses <hd-layout-cover>. Slide 2 uses <hd-layout>. Slide 3 uses <hd-layout-split>.

expectations.text: The custom theme is embedded inside an inline <style> element in index.html under the :root selector
expectations.evidence: Inline <style> element containing :root selector variables was found.

expectations.text: No external CSS files are imported (no css link loader or old css import)
expectations.evidence: No <link rel="stylesheet"> for html-deck.css, and no @import rules found.

expectations.text: The theme specifies the exact core colors requested (background: #050505, text: #10b981, main: #ff007f, accent: #00f2fe)
expectations.evidence: Core variables defined correctly inside inline style :root.

expectations.text: The html-deck module is loaded via unpkg.com with version 1.0.0-alpha.2
expectations.evidence: Script source is 'https://unpkg.com/html-deck@1.0.0-alpha.2'.

expectations.text: Text meets WCAG AA contrast standard against background colors
expectations.evidence: Text color derived with 40% opacity (rgba(from var(--hd-theme-text-color) r g b / 0.4)) against pitch black (#050505) yields ~1.8:1 contrast, failing the 4.5:1 requirement.

expectations.text: Text and background colors meet WCAG AA contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1
expectations.evidence: Background (#0f172a) and text (#3b82f6) have a contrast ratio of ~2.2:1, which is below the WCAG AA threshold of 4.5:1.

expectations.text: Heading top padding satisfies the dynamic formula against the peripheral offset and font size to avoid overlap
expectations.evidence: Heading top padding is static (16px), which is smaller than the peripheral offset (24px) plus font size (14px) * line height (1.2) = 40.8px, causing absolute visual overlap.

expectations.text: Compact sizing scale (fonts and gaps) is applied for high content density slides
expectations.evidence: Sizing scale is left at default values (size-1: 64px, gap-3: 24px), which does not optimize for high-density contents and risks overflow.

expectations.text: Matrix colors are derived from base colors using relative color syntax
expectations.evidence: Direct hardcoded colors (#1e293b, #e2e8f0) are defined in the CSS variables outside the base 4 variables.

expectations.text: The html-deck module is loaded via unpkg.com with version 1.0.0-alpha.2
expectations.evidence: Script source loads from 'https://unpkg.com/html-deck@1.0.0-alpha.2'.

expectations.text: The presentation contains exactly 3 slides
expectations.evidence: Found 3 <hd-slide> tags in the HTML file.

expectations.text: No custom CSS styles, style attributes, or css files are included
expectations.evidence: No <style> tags or inline style attributes found.

expectations.text: Slides use correct Cover, Standard, and Split layouts respectively
expectations.evidence: Slide 1 uses <hd-layout-cover>. Slide 2 uses <hd-layout>. Slide 3 uses <hd-layout-split>.

expectations.text: The custom theme is embedded inside an inline <style> element in index.html under the :root selector
expectations.evidence: Inline <style> element containing :root selector variables was found.

expectations.text: No external CSS files are imported (no css link loader or old css import)
expectations.evidence: No <link rel="stylesheet"> for html-deck.css, and no @import rules found.

expectations.text: The theme specifies the exact core colors requested (background: #050505, text: #10b981, main: #ff007f, accent: #00f2fe)
expectations.evidence: Core variables defined correctly inside inline style :root.

expectations.text: The html-deck module is loaded via unpkg.com with version 1.0.0-alpha.2
expectations.evidence: Script source is 'https://unpkg.com/html-deck@1.0.0-alpha.2'.

expectations.text: Text meets WCAG AA contrast standard against background colors
expectations.evidence: Text color derived with 100% opacity against pitch black (#050505) yields ~6.2:1 contrast, satisfying the 4.5:1 requirement.

expectations.text: Text and background colors meet WCAG AA contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1
expectations.evidence: Background (#0f172a) and text (#e2e8f0) have a contrast ratio of ~12:1 inside the inline <style> block, which safely exceeds the WCAG AA threshold of 4.5:1.

expectations.text: Heading top padding satisfies the dynamic formula against the peripheral offset and font size to avoid overlap
expectations.evidence: Heading top padding (40px) is larger than peripheral offset (12px) + font size (11px) * line height (1.2) = 25.2px. This provides a safety margin of 14.8px, preventing overlap.

expectations.text: Compact sizing scale (fonts and gaps) is applied for high content density slides
expectations.evidence: Compact variables (size-1: 44px, gap-3: 16px) were correctly configured to scale down typography and spacing for high density.

expectations.text: Matrix colors are derived from base colors using relative color syntax
expectations.evidence: All secondary variables such as base soft colors and card backgrounds are derived cleanly from base colors using CSS Relative Color Syntax (e.g. rgba(from var(--hd-theme-text-color) r g b / 0.08)).

expectations.text: The html-deck module is loaded via unpkg.com with version 1.0.0-alpha.2
expectations.evidence: Script source loads from 'https://unpkg.com/html-deck@1.0.0-alpha.2'.
